PFUUnitsSystem.cc
1 // -*- tab-width: 2; indent-tabs-mode: nil; coding: utf-8-with-signature -*-

6 //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
7 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Utils.h"
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/PropertyHolder.h"
9 #include "IUnitsSystem.h"
10 #include "PFUUnitsSystem.h"
11 
12 using namespace Arcane;
13 
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
15 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
16 
17 void
18 PFUUnitsSystemService::
19 init()
20 {
21  // jour -> seconde
22  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Time,86400.) ;
23  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Time,"D.") ;
24  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Time,"day") ;
25  // ft -> m
26  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::X,0.3048) ;
27  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::X,"ft") ;
28  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::X,"feet") ;
29 
30  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Y,0.3048) ;
31  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Y,"ft") ;
32  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Y,"feet") ;
33 
34  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Z,0.3048) ;
35  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Z,"ft") ;
36  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Z,"feet") ;
37 
38  // rad -> deg
39  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Angle,0.01745329) ;
40  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Angle,"deg") ;
41  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Angle,"degree") ;
42 
43  // ft2 -> m2
44  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Surface,0.092903040) ;
45  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Surface,"ft2") ;
46  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Surface,"square feet") ;
47 
48  // ft -> m
49  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Height,0.3048) ;
50  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Height,"ft") ;
51  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Height,"feet") ;
52 
53  // BBl -> m3
54  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Volume,0.1589873) ;
55  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Volume,"BBl") ;
56  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Volume,"Barils per day") ;
57 
58  // ft3 -> m3
59  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolume,0.0283168) ;
60  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolume,"ft3") ;
61  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolume,"cubic feet") ;
62 
63  // BBl/Mcft -> vol/vol
64  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolumeFactor,0.00561) ;
65  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolumeFactor,"BBl/mcft") ;
66  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolumeFactor,"Barils per 1E3 cubic feet") ;
67 
68  // psi -> pa
69  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Pressure,6.894757E+03) ;
70  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Pressure,"psi") ;
71  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Pressure,"pound per square inch") ;
72 
73  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::CapillaryPressure,6.894757E+03) ;
74  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::CapillaryPressure,"psi") ;
75  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::CapillaryPressure,"pound per square inch") ;
76 
77  // lb/ft2 -> N/m2
78  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Constraint,4.8824) ;
79  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Constraint,"psi") ;
80  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Constraint,"pound per square inch") ;
81 
82  // d�F -> d�K
83  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Temperature,.5555555) ;
84  m_const_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Temperature,255.3722) ;
85  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Temperature,"F") ;
86  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Temperature,"Fahrenheit degree") ;
87 
88  // F/ft -> K/m
89  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalGradient,1.8226870) ;
90  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalGradient,"F/ft") ;
91  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalGradient,"Fahrenheit degree per feet") ;
92 
93  // md.ft -> m3
94  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Transmissivity,3.0081E-16) ;
95  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Transmissivity,"md.ft") ;
96  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Transmissivity,"md.ft") ;
97 
98  // md -> m2
99  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Permeability,9.869233E-16) ;
100  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Permeability,"md") ;
101  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Permeability,"milli darcy") ;
102 
103  // ft2/d -> m2/s
104  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Diffusion,1.07527E-6) ;
105  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Diffusion,"ft2/d") ;
106  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Diffusion,"square foot per day") ;
107 
108  // 1/d -> 1/s
109  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Flow,.1157407E-4) ;
110  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Flow,"mol/d") ;
111  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Flow,"mole per day") ;
112 
113  // MMlb/d -> kg/s
114  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassFlow,5.249907) ;
115  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassFlow,"MMlb/d") ;
116  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassFlow,"MMlb/d") ;
117 
118  // D�bit liquide (bbl/d) -> m3/s
119  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::LiqVolFlow,1.8401E-6) ;
120  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::LiqVolFlow,"BBl/d") ;
121  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::LiqVolFlow,"Barils per day") ;
122 
123  // D�bit gas (Mcf/d) -> m3/s
124  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolFlow,3.2774E-4) ;
125  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolFlow,"Mcf/d") ;
126  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolFlow,"1000*cft per day") ;
127 
128  // mol/ft3 -> mol/m3
129  //m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Density,16.0185) ;
130 
131  // cP -> Pa/s
132  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Viscosity,0.001) ;
133  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Viscosity,"cP") ;
134  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Viscosity,"centiPoise") ;
135 
136  // 1/psi -> 1/pa
137  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Compressibility,1.45038E-4) ;
138  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Compressibility,"1/psi") ;
139  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Compressibility,"square inch per pound") ;
140 
141  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Mass,.453592E+6) ;
142  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Mass,"MMlb") ;
143  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Mass,"MMlb") ;
144 
145  // lb/lbmole-> kg/mol
146  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarMass,0.001) ;
147  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarMass,"g/mole") ;
148  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarMass,"grammme per mole") ;
149 
150  // cft/lbmole -> m3/mol
151  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarVol,0.6242796E-4) ;
152  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarVol,"cft.lbmol-1") ;
153  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarVol,"cubic feet per lbmole") ;
154 
155  // lb/ft3 -> kg/m3
156  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassDensity,16.0185) ;
157  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassDensity,"lb/ft3") ;
158  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassDensity,"lb per cubic feet") ;
159 
160  // cft/bbl -> vol/vol
161  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Rs,0.178108) ;
162  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Rs,"cft/bbl") ;
163  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Rs,"cubic feet per barrel") ;
164 
165  // Mscft/bbl -> vol/vol
166  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasOilVolumeRatio,178.108) ;
167  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Rs,"Mscft/bbl") ;
168  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Rs,"10E3 standard cubic feet per barrel") ;
169 
170 
171  // inch -> m
172  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Radius,0.0254) ;
173  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Radius,"inch") ;
174  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Radius,"inch") ;
175 
176  // Btu -> J
177  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Energy,1055.056) ;
178  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Energy,"Btu") ;
179  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Energy,"British thermal unit") ;
180 
181  // Btu/(lb.�F) -> J/(Kg.�K)
182  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacity,4.1868E+3) ;
183  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacity,"Btu/(lb.F)") ;
184  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacity,"British thermal unit per pound Fahrenheit degree") ;
185 
186  // Btu/(lb.�F2) -> J/(Kg.�K2)
187  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacityT,7.5362E+3) ;
188  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacityT,"Btu/(lb.F2)") ;
189  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacityT,"British thermal unit per pound square Fahrenheit degree") ;
190 
191  // Btu/(cft.�F) -> J/(m3.�K)
192  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacity,6.7066E+4) ;
193  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacity,"Btu/(cft.F)") ;
194  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacity,"British thermal unit per cubic feet Fahrenheit degree") ;
195 
196  // Btu/(cft.�F2) -> J/(m3.�K2)
197  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacityT,1.2071861E+5) ;
198  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacityT,"Btu/(cft.F2)") ;
199  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacityT,"British thermal unit per cubic feet square Fahrenheit degree") ;
200 
201  // 1/�F -> 1/�K
202  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::InvTemperature,1.8) ;
203  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::InvTemperature,"1/F") ;
204  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::InvTemperature,"Reciprocal Fahrenheit degree") ;
205 
206  // Btu/(ft.D.�F) -> W/(m.K)
207  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalConductivity,0.072114) ;
208  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalConductivity,"Btu/(ft.D.F)") ;
209  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalConductivity,"British thermal unit per day feet Fahrenheit degree") ;
210 
211  // CPO.BBL/D/PSI -> PA.S.M3/S/PA
212  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ProductivityIndex, 2.6688E-13) ;
213  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ProductivityIndex,"cP.BBl/D/psi") ;
214  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ProductivityIndex,"Productivity Index unit") ;
215 
216  // Btu/D -> J/s
217  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatRate,12211.292e-06) ;
218  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatRate,"Btu/D") ;
219  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatRate,"British thermal unit per day") ;
220 
221  // Btu/lb -> J/Kg
222  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SpecificEnergy,2.3260E+3) ;
223  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SpecificEnergy,"Btu/lb") ;
224  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SpecificEnergy,"British thermal unit per pound") ;
225 
226  // BBl/D(cwe) -> dm3/s
227  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamRate,1.8401E-3) ;
228  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamRate,"BBl/d(cwe)") ;
229  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamRate,"British Cold Water Equivalent Steam Flow") ;
230 
231  // BBl(cwe) -> dm3
232  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamVolume,158.9873) ;
233  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamVolume,"BBl(cwe)") ;
234  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamVolume,"British Cold Water Equivalent Steam Volume") ;
235 
236  // Mcft/t -> m3/kg
237  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassicVolume,0.02831684659) ;
238  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassicVolume,"mcft/t") ;
239  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassicVolume,"1E3 cubic feet per ton") ;
240 
241  // aft3 - > m3
242  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::PorousVolume,1233.489) ;
243  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::PorousVolume,"aft3") ;
244  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::PorousVolume,"Acre feet") ;
245 
246  // psi/ft -> N/m3
247  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Stiffness,2.262059E+4) ;
248  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Stiffness,"psi/ft") ;
249  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Stiffness,"psi per feet") ;
250 
251  // Btu/(D.ft2) -> W/m2
252  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatFluxDensity,0.1314406) ;
253  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatFluxDensity,"Btu/D/ft2") ;
254  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatFluxDensity,"British Thermal Unit per day per square foot") ;
255 
256  // inch/d -> m3/m2/s
257  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::RainFall,2.93981481e-7) ;
258  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::RainFall,"inch/d") ;
259  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::RainFall,"inch per day") ;
260 
261  // ft2/d -> m2/s
262  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalDiffusivity,1.07527E-6) ;
263  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalDiffusivity,"ft2/d") ;
264  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalDiffusivity,"square feet per day") ;
265 }
266 
267 bool
268 PFUUnitsSystemService::
269 hasMultFactor(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
270 {
271  return (m_mult_factors.hasProperty(unit)) ;
272 }
273 
274 Real
275 PFUUnitsSystemService::
276 getMultFactor(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
277 {
278  return m_mult_factors.getProperty(unit,1.) ;
279 }
280 
281 bool
282 PFUUnitsSystemService::
283 hasConstFactor(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
284 {
285  return (m_const_factors.hasProperty(unit)) ;
286 }
287 
288 Real
289 PFUUnitsSystemService::
290 getConstFactor(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
291 {
292  return m_const_factors.getProperty(unit,0.) ;
293 }
294 
295 bool
296 PFUUnitsSystemService::
297 hasMultFactorTo(IUnitsSystem* system, UnitType unit)
298 {
299  return getMultFactor(unit) != system->getMultFactor(unit) ;
300 }
301 
302 Real
303 PFUUnitsSystemService::
304 getMultFactorTo(IUnitsSystem* system, UnitType unit)
305 {
306  return getMultFactor(unit)/system->getMultFactor(unit);
307 }
308 
309 bool
310 PFUUnitsSystemService::
311 hasConstFactorTo(IUnitsSystem* system, UnitType unit)
312 {
313  return getConstFactor(unit) != system->getConstFactor(unit);
314 }
315 
316 Real
317 PFUUnitsSystemService::
318 getConstFactorTo(IUnitsSystem* system, UnitType unit)
319 {
320  return (getConstFactor(unit)-system->getConstFactor(unit))/system->getMultFactor(unit);
321 }
322 
323 Real PFUUnitsSystemService::convert(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,Real val)
324 {
325  return m_const_factors.getProperty(unit,0.)+val*getMultFactor(unit) ;
326 }
327 
328 Real PFUUnitsSystemService::unconvert(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,Real val)
329 {
330  return (val-m_const_factors.getProperty(unit,0.))/getMultFactor(unit) ;
331 }
332 
333 void PFUUnitsSystemService::convert(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,ArrayView<Real> buf)
334 {
335  Real* ptr = buf.unguardedBasePointer() ;
336  const Real factor = getMultFactor(unit) ;
337  const Real const_factor = getConstFactor(unit) ;
338  for(Integer i=0;i<buf.size();i++)
339  ptr[i] = const_factor+factor*ptr[i] ;
340 }
341 
342 void PFUUnitsSystemService::unconvert(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,ArrayView<Real> buf)
343 {
344  Real* ptr = buf.unguardedBasePointer() ;
345  const Real factor = getMultFactor(unit) ;
346  const Real const_factor = getConstFactor(unit) ;
347  for(Integer i=0;i<buf.size();i++)
348  {
349  ptr[i] -= const_factor ;
350  ptr[i] /= factor ;
351  }
352 }
353 
354 Real
355 PFUUnitsSystemService::
356 convertTo(IUnitsSystem* system, IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,Real val)
357 {
358  return getMultFactorTo(system,unit)*val + getConstFactorTo(system,unit);
359 }
360 
361 void
362 PFUUnitsSystemService::
363 convertTo(IUnitsSystem* system,IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,ArrayView<Real> buf)
364 {
365  Real* ptr = buf.unguardedBasePointer() ;
366  const Real factor = getMultFactorTo(system,unit) ;
367  const Real const_factor = getConstFactorTo(system,unit) ;
368  for(Integer i=0;i<buf.size();i++)
369  ptr[i] = const_factor+factor*ptr[i] ;
370 }
371 
372 String
373 PFUUnitsSystemService::
374 getShortName(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
375 {
376  return m_short_name.getProperty(unit,IUnitsSystem::getSIUnitShortName(unit)) ;
377 }
378 
379 String
380 PFUUnitsSystemService::
381 getLongName(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
382 {
383  return m_long_name.getProperty(unit,IUnitsSystem::getSIUnitLongName(unit)) ;
384 }
385 
386 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
387 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
388 
389 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_PFUUNITSSYSTEM(PFUUnitsSystem,PFUUnitsSystemService);
390 
IUnitsSystem
Definition: IUnitsSystem.h:152
IUnitsSystem::getConstFactor
virtual Real getConstFactor(UnitType unit)=0
Terme pour passer en unit� standart (local->SI)
IUnitsSystem::getMultFactor
virtual Real getMultFactor(UnitType unit)=0
Facteur pour passer en unit� standart (local->SI)
PFUUnitsSystemService
Interface du service du modu?le de resolution non lineaire.
Definition: PFUUnitsSystem.h:21
Arcane
Interface permettant de definir les services uniques d'une application.
